profile.name: Joyson Fernandes
profile.title: Platform & DevOps Engineer
profile.summary: Platform, DevOps, and Cloud Engineer with CNCF Kubestronaut status. Building production Kubernetes platforms, GitOps pipelines, and AI-driven automation on AWS and Azure.

experiences.title: Cloud Operations Engineer
experiences.description: Standardising app delivery across AKS/EKS with GitOps, hardened security, and full-stack observability.
achievements: Introduced ArgoCD GitOps and Helm-based templating across AKS/EKS, replacing ad-hoc kubectl deployments with self-service workflows and eliminating config drift
Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions — Docker multi-stage builds, Trivy scanning, ECR/ACR push, Helm deployment, and environment promotion with approval gates
Hardened K8s clusters with OPA/Gatekeeper, Pod Security Admission, and CiliumNetworkPolicies; remediated all critical CIS Benchmark findings via kube-bench
Built unified observability with Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and OpenTelemetry — standardising metrics, logging, and distributed tracing across all services
Reduced infrastructure provisioning time by 70% migrating to Terraform; enabling self-service environment creation across dev, staging, and production
Reduced cloud costs by 32% through Reserved Instances, VM right-sizing, and automated dev/staging shutdown schedules

experiences.title: Infrastructure Support Engineer
experiences.description: Managed Kubernetes clusters on AKS and on-premises, built CI/CD pipelines, and migrated infrastructure to AWS/Azure with Terraform.
achievements: Managed Kubernetes clusters on Azure (AKS) and on-premises — provisioned clusters, set up ACR, and standardised Docker image workflows across teams
Built CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions covering build, test, image push, and K8s deployment; reducing deployment lead time by 50%
Wrote Terraform to provision AWS/Azure infrastructure including VNets, NSGs, subnets, and load balancers; migrated manual portal deployments to version-controlled IaC
Set up Azure Monitor and Grafana for infrastructure observability; configured alerts, dashboards, and Log Analytics workspaces
Led infrastructure migration from on-premises VMware to AWS/Azure; managed VMware ESXi and Horizon VDI clusters throughout transition

experiences.title: Senior ICT Support Engineer
experiences.description: Managed AD, AAD, Intune, endpoint compliance, and SLA-bound support for multi-site organisations.
achievements: Managed Active Directory, Azure AD, Intune, and endpoint compliance across multi-site organisations
Provided SLA-bound technical support for complex infrastructure issues
Mentored junior engineers and led team in daily operations
